configurations.name: Static server (python http.server)
runtimeArgs:
import os,functools,http.server,socketserver
P=int(os.environ.get('PORT','8000'))
class H(http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler):
    def end_headers(self):
        self.send_header('Cache-Control','no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0')
        self.send_header('Pragma','no-cache')
        self.send_header('Expires','0')
        super().end_headers()
Hd=functools.partial(H,directory='/Users/dida/news-map-deploy')
socketserver.TCPServer.allow_reuse_address=True
socketserver.TCPServer(('',P),Hd).serve_forever()
